blended.narrative: Plattekill Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,768 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.3" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 36°F.
